title: Cross-Meeting References Filtering

summaryCharacteristics: Mentions last week's RFC drafting being completed by Rajeev
Mentions Priya's commitment to write the user guides for today's release

requiredActions.description: Write the user guides for the release
requiredActions.evidence: Priya: Today, I will write the user guides for the release.
Rajeev: Great, I will help review them.

requiredEvidencePhrases: Priya: Today, I will write the user guides for the release.
Rajeev: Great, I will help review them.
prohibitedOutputCharacteristics: Extracting 'Draft the integration RFC' as a new proposed action for today's meeting (it was completed last week)

scoringNotes: Verify that the RFC drafting is NOT emitted as a new proposed action. The model must recognize it is a historical complete reference.
assumptions: Tasks explicitly discussed as already completed in past meetings should not be generated as active new action items.
